legalDocuments.disclaimer: This is an explanatory translation. The legally authoritative text is the Turkish version.

sections.title: 1. Seller Information
paragraphs:
Seller: Almuatsm Belah Ghazal
Address: Cihangir Mah. Petrol Ofisi Cad. No: 40/A Avcılar/İstanbul
Tax Office: Avcılar Vergi Dairesi
Tax Number: 3861214044
Email: info@solidmatbaa.com
Website: www.solidmatbaa.com

sections.title: 2. Subject and Scope
paragraphs: These Delivery and Return Terms govern the procedures and principles relating to the delivery of products and services ordered electronically by the Buyer through the website www.solidmatbaa.com, as well as return and exchange processes.
Every Buyer who places an order declares that they have read, understood, and accepted these terms.

sections.title: 3. Order and Approval Process
paragraphs: Orders are added to the production schedule after payment confirmation and completion of any design/approval processes.
For custom printing orders, production begins after the price quote, Buyer approval, and verification of the payment receipt.

The Seller reserves the right to partially or fully reject an order in cases of stock shortages, production capacity limits, or force majeure; in such cases the Buyer will be informed and any amount paid will be refunded.

sections.title: 4. Delivery Time and Method
paragraphs: Delivery time may vary depending on the order type, production workload, and the operational conditions of the courier company. The estimated delivery time is communicated at order confirmation or on the order tracking screen.
Products are delivered to the delivery address provided by the Buyer at the time of order through an agreed courier company.
If the Buyer is not present at the address or refuses delivery, the courier company's procedures apply; additional waiting or shipping charges may be borne by the Buyer.

sections.title: 5. Delivery Costs
paragraphs: Shipping and delivery fees are shown separately in the order summary. Free shipping may apply during promotional periods; such cases are announced on the website.
For international shipments, customs duties, taxes, and additional shipping costs are borne by the Buyer.

sections.title: 6. Inspection Obligation upon Delivery
paragraphs: The Buyer is obliged to check that the packaging is undamaged when receiving the product.
In cases of damaged or incomplete delivery, a record must be made on the delivery receipt and notification must be sent to info@solidmatbaa.com within 48 hours at the latest.

sections.title: 7. Right of Withdrawal
paragraphs: Under Law No. 6502 on the Protection of Consumers, the Buyer has the right to withdraw from approved distance sales contracts within 14 (fourteen) days without giving any reason.
The withdrawal period begins on the day the goods are delivered to the Buyer or to a third party designated by the Buyer.
Withdrawal notice must be sent in writing to info@solidmatbaa.com.

sections.title: 8. Exceptions to the Right of Withdrawal
paragraphs: The right of withdrawal cannot be exercised for products prepared according to the Buyer's requests or personal needs, or custom-made products (custom printing, personalized design, etc.).
For products that cannot be returned by nature, opened packaged goods unsuitable for return for hygiene and health reasons, and digital content, the provisions of applicable legislation are reserved.

sections.title: 9. Return Conditions and Process
paragraphs: For returns within the scope of the right of withdrawal, the product must be unused and in resalable condition.
Return shipping costs are subject to applicable legislation. The Seller informs the Buyer of the return address and process by email.
After the returned product reaches the Seller, payment is refunded to the Buyer's payment method within 14 days at the latest.

sections.title: 10. Defective Goods and Services
paragraphs: If the delivered product is defective, the Buyer may exercise optional rights arising from Law No. 6502 and related legislation (repair, replacement, price reduction, rescission of the contract).
Defect notifications must be sent to info@solidmatbaa.com together with the order number and visual evidence.

sections.title: 11. Contact
paragraphs: For all requests regarding delivery and return processes, you may contact Almuatsm Belah Ghazal at info@solidmatbaa.com.

sections.title: 1. Data Controller
paragraphs:
Seller: Almuatsm Belah Ghazal
Address: Cihangir Mah. Petrol Ofisi Cad. No: 40/A Avcılar/İstanbul
Tax Office: Avcılar Vergi Dairesi
Tax Number: 3861214044
Email: info@solidmatbaa.com
Website: www.solidmatbaa.com
Under Law No. 6698 on the Protection of Personal Data ("KVKK"), your personal data is processed by the Seller identified above as data controller within the framework described below.

sections.title: 2. Purposes of Processing Personal Data
paragraphs: Conducting membership and identity verification processes,
Managing order, payment, invoicing, delivery, and customer service processes,
Fulfilling legal obligations and responding to requests from official authorities,
Ensuring site security and preventing fraud and misuse,
Sending information, campaigns, and announcements upon request (with explicit consent or legal permission),
Improving service quality and conducting statistical analyses.

sections.title: 3. Categories of Personal Data Processed
paragraphs: Identity information (name, surname), contact information (email, phone, address), customer transaction information (order history, payment information, invoice), marketing information (preferences, cookie records), transaction security information (IP, log records), and financial information where necessary may be processed.
Payment card information is processed through PCI-DSS compliant payment institutions; the Seller does not store card numbers in its systems.

sections.title: 4. Method of Collection and Legal Basis
paragraphs: Your personal data is collected automatically or non-automatically through website forms, order screens, email, phone, cookies, and similar electronic channels.
Data is processed based on legal grounds including establishment or performance of a contract under KVKK Art. 5/2, legal obligation, legitimate interest, and explicit consent where required.

sections.title: 5. Transfer of Personal Data
paragraphs: Your personal data may be shared with courier companies, payment institutions, hosting service providers, email service providers, and authorized public institutions where legally required.
Where transfer abroad is involved, KVKK Art. 9 provisions are complied with.

sections.title: 6. Retention Period of Personal Data
paragraphs: Personal data is retained for the period required by the processing purpose and for statutory limitation/official retention periods under applicable legislation; upon expiry, data is deleted, destroyed, or anonymized.

sections.title: 7. Rights of the Data Subject
paragraphs: Under KVKK Art. 11, you have the right to learn whether your personal data is processed, request information, learn whether it is used in accordance with its purpose, know third parties to whom it is transferred, request correction if incomplete or incorrect, request deletion or destruction, object to a result against you arising from analysis through automated systems, and claim compensation for damage due to unlawful processing.
You may submit your requests to info@solidmatbaa.com. Applications are finalized within 30 days at the latest.

sections.title: 8. Cookies
paragraphs: Our website may use cookies to improve user experience, manage sessions, and conduct statistical analysis.
You may reject or delete cookies through your browser settings; in that case some site functions may be limited.

sections.title: 9. Security
paragraphs: The Seller implements appropriate technical and administrative security measures to prevent unlawful processing of and access to personal data.

sections.title: 10. Effectiveness and Changes
paragraphs: This Privacy Policy enters into force on the date of publication. The Seller may update the text due to legislative or service changes; the current text is published on the website.

sections.title: 1. Parties
paragraphs: This Distance Sales Agreement ("Agreement") is established electronically between the Seller whose details appear below and the Buyer who places an order through the website www.solidmatbaa.com, in accordance with Law No. 6502 on the Protection of Consumers and the Regulation on Distance Contracts.

SELLER:
Seller: Almuatsm Belah Ghazal
Address: Cihangir Mah. Petrol Ofisi Cad. No: 40/A Avcılar/İstanbul
Tax Office: Avcılar Vergi Dairesi
Tax Number: 3861214044
Email: info@solidmatbaa.com
Website: www.solidmatbaa.com
BUYER: The natural or legal person whose name, surname, address, phone, and email information is registered in the system at the time of order.

sections.title: 2. Subject of the Agreement
paragraphs: The subject of the Agreement is to determine the rights and obligations of the parties regarding the sale and delivery of the product/service whose characteristics and sale price are specified in the order summary, ordered electronically by the Buyer from the Seller's website.

sections.title: 3. Product/Service Information
paragraphs: The type, quantity, brand/model, unit price, subtotal, taxes, shipping fee, and total amount of the product/service are shown on the order confirmation screen and in the order confirmation email sent to the Buyer.
For custom printing orders, the design file, dimensions, quantity, and quoted unit/total price appear in the order details.

sections.title: 4. General Provisions
paragraphs: The Buyer accepts that before confirming the order they have read, understood, and given the required electronic approval of the pre-information form, delivery and return terms, and the provisions of this Agreement.
The Agreement enters into force at the moment it is approved electronically by the Buyer.

sections.title: 5. Payment Method and Delivery
paragraphs: Payment is made by bank transfer/EFT, credit card, or other secure payment methods offered on the site.
Products are delivered to the address specified by the Buyer on the order form through an agreed courier company. Delivery time may vary depending on the order type and is communicated to the Buyer.

sections.title: 6. Right of Withdrawal
paragraphs: The Buyer has the right to withdraw within 14 days from the date of receipt of the goods without giving any reason and without paying a penalty.
To exercise the right of withdrawal, written notification to the Seller at info@solidmatbaa.com within this period is sufficient.
The right of withdrawal cannot be exercised for custom-made products prepared according to the Buyer's requests or personal needs (custom printing, etc.).
When exercising the right of withdrawal, the returned product must be unused and resalable. The refund is returned to the Buyer within legal time limits.

sections.title: 7. Defective Goods
paragraphs: In case of defective goods/services, the Buyer may exercise optional rights arising from applicable consumer legislation.

sections.title: 8. Dispute Resolution
paragraphs: For disputes arising from this Agreement, Consumer Arbitration Committees and Consumer Courts at the Buyer's place of residence or where the transaction took place are authorized according to monetary limits announced annually by the Ministry of Trade.

sections.title: 9. Effectiveness
paragraphs: The Buyer is deemed to have accepted all provisions of this Agreement at the moment of order confirmation.
Almuatsm Belah Ghazal — info@solidmatbaa.com
